emails.subject: RE: Contract status needed
emails.body: RE: Contract status needed This is what we've got so far. Due to our agency activity on Lone Star, I do not want to contact them yet. But, I have a copy of a contract they sent me a couple of months ago we can use. D To: Kinsey, Lisa; Sullivan, Patti; Gay, Randall L.; Lamadrid, Victor; Farmer, Daren J.; Jaquet, Tammy; Calcagno, Suzanne

emails.subject: RE: Contract status needed
emails.body: RE: Contract status needed Bob, Who is collecting the hard copies or e-mails of contracts? I've got the Guadalupe contracts now. D To: Kinsey, Lisa; Sullivan, Patti; Gay, Randall L.; Lamadrid, Victor; Farmer, Daren J.; Jaquet, Tammy; Calcagno, Suzanne

emails.subject: RE: Contract status needed
emails.body: Daren, please forward to Suzanne Calcagno, she sits near me on 5 Tks Bob To: Superty, Robert
